untranslatable_reason: Signal requires market selection logic based on system type identification, seasonal correlation measurement (0-1 scale), Elliott Wave validity scoring (0-1 scale), and historical Sharpe ratio calculation. These are portfolio-level meta-filters and performance metrics not expressible as intra-bar technical conditions. The signal is a market selection rule, not a tradeable entry/exit signal. ATR or hvol_20 can approximate volatility percentile, but seasonal_correlation and elliott_wave_validity_score are not available indicators.
translation_notes: This signal describes a market selection/filtering framework rather than entry/exit conditions. It requires: (1) documented system specification, (2) market characteristic measurement (volatility percentile ≥75th OR seasonal_correlation ≥0.60 OR elliott_wave_validity ≥0.70), and (3) historical backtest validation (Sharpe ≥1.5). Only volatility can be approximated using hvol_20 as a proxy for the 75th percentile volatility threshold. Seasonal correlation and Elliott Wave scoring require external pre-computation outside the backtest engine. Recommend implementing this as a pre-filter stage before signal execution.
